commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=7f1700bfccba4c29fe5c1db6273ce2005db2daf6)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Anthropic session-history sanitization so stale assistant thinking blocks with empty or blank signatures are stripped before direct `anthropic-messages` replay, with a focused regression test.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +24. Total +30 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current source shows the sanitizer still preserves the latest assistant by default even when a newer user message follows, and the linked issue plus PR proof describe the failing `anthropic-messages` replay shape.
commands.review_followup: Human/contributor follow-up is needed because the external PR proof gate failed and the patch has a small CI type-check defect; ClawSweeper should not take over while proof remains insufficient.

target.title: fix(agents): strip stale invalid Anthropic thinking
target.author: turbotheturtle

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
